title: dryopsis scabrosa
intro: Dryopsis scabrosa, also known as the roughleaf golden polypody, is a species of fern native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dryopsis scabrosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. It is often prepared as a tea or dried extract, and can also be found in herbal supplements and tinctures.
